name: liquid-elegance
description: Liquid Elegance — A production-ready Bootstrap 5 admin template with glassmorphism design

scripts.build:css: sass src/scss/main.scss dist/full/css/liquid-elegance.css --style=compressed --source-map --load-path=node_modules --quiet-deps && node ./node_modules/postcss-cli/index.js dist/full/css/liquid-elegance.css --replace --no-map && sass src/scss/main.scss dist/full/css/liquid-elegance.dev.css --style=expanded --source-map --load-path=node_modules --quiet-deps && node ./node_modules/postcss-cli/index.js dist/full/css/liquid-elegance.dev.css --replace --no-map
scripts.build: npm run build:vendor && npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:assets && npm run build:variants && npm run build:html
